language_detector_rule: English-like if repaired text has at least 8 alphabetic chars, ASCII-letter ratio >= 0.86, at least 3 normalized tokens, and either 2 common English marker hits, or 1 marker plus 1 hotel-domain hit, or 2 hotel-domain hits with ASCII ratio >= 0.94.

selected_hotels.first_review: Air conditioned rooms kept clean daily, pool with amazing view, very friendly staff Location was a bit far out of town from central tourist locations

The staff was lovely and very accommodating. The breakfast was outstanding - lots of choices, all of which were absolutely delicious. The room was clean and well maintained, and the beds were super comfortable. The location was ideal, right in the old quarter but on a quiet street so we could sleep well. I can’t imagine a better place to stay in Hanoi! Nothing!
Great location and amazing staffs. the hotel is under construction so it smells bad and a little messy.

Clean , very welcoming staff. Great room and versatile breakfast. 10 minutes walk from the city center 
Great experience Nothing
It’s a great location with very friendly staff.

Cảm ơn các bạn rất nhiều 
Fantastic hotel and service !!!

Excellent hotel located in the best possible location in Hanoi. The rooms were outstanding, the restaurant were so good but the best aspect was the service. The staff treated you like you were a VIP in their own home. Highly recommended.
We had a great experience. Especially Anna und Emma were so lovely and the helped us a lot during our stay! 5 stars and 100% recommondation.

Schon beim Empfang im Hotel bekamen wir eine Vorahnung wie schön unser Urlaub werden sollte, doch wurde dieses Gefühl im weiteren Verlauf noch weit übertroffen. Während der ganzen Zeit wurden uns quasi unsere Wünsche von den Augen abgelesen. Das gesamte Hotelpersonal kann man nur in den höchsten Tönen loben. Mit einem ausgezeichneten und reichlichem Frühstück konnten wir den Tag beginnen. Und am Abend bestand die Möglichkeit auf der Dachterrasse oder in einem der Restaurants den Tag gemütlich ausklingen zulassen. Sollten wir wieder nach Hanoi kommen werden wir mit Sicherheit wieder dieses Hotel buchen. Danke für die Gastfreundschaft welche wir während unseres Aufenthaltes bei euch genießen durften.
When we arrived at the hotel we had a feeling of how wonderful our holiday was going to be, but this feeling was far exceeded as the trip progressed. During the whole time, our wishes were practically read from our eyes. The entire hotel staff can only be praised highly. We started the day with an excellent and plentiful breakfast. And in the evening we had the opportunity to end the day comfortably on the roof terrace or in one of the restaurants. If we come back to Hanoi, we will definitely book this hotel again. Thank you for the hospitality that we were able to enjoy during our stay with you.
Ngay tại quầy lễ tân của khách sạn, chúng tôi đã mơ hồ biết được kỳ nghỉ của mình sẽ tuyệt vời như thế nào, nhưng cảm giác này còn vượt xa hơn khi nó diễn ra. Trong suốt thời gian đó, mong muốn của chúng tôi thực tế đã được đọc từ mắt chúng tôi. Toàn bộ nhân viên khách sạn chỉ có thể được khen ngợi cao. Chúng tôi bắt đầu ngày mới bằng bữa sáng phong phú và tuyệt vời. Và vào buổi tối, bạn có cơ hội kết thúc một ngày một cách thoải mái trên sân thượng hoặc tại một trong những nhà hàng. Nếu quay lại Hà Nội chắc chắn chúng tôi sẽ đặt lại khách sạn này. Cảm ơn bạn vì sự hiếu khách mà chúng tôi đã có thể tận hưởng trong suốt thời gian lưu trú với bạn. Hier gab es nix zu meckern
Very nice large room and comfy beds.

overall.rouge_note: ROUGE-1/2/L from the SemAE paper requires human gold summaries; this CSV has reviews only, so this trial reports image-formula CEC/ASC instead.
overall.scoring_note: unique_opinions and cluster_weight are counted on the whole input; summary/CEC/ASC use a capped representative evidence set per aspect.

Amazing property, from the start to the end, Luxurious feel to the property for a price that won’t break the bank, staff are always kind and helpful and willing to provide impeccable service, Helping with bags, nice and friendly attitude, very classy hotel and is a must if you want to ball out on a budget The location was a bit far from other central areas but grab and taxis are frequently available for the 10-15 min drive, costing on average 2-4$ AUD

The only good thing about the hotel was our room but I have to mention the fact that we had the Luxury Double room so we had a big room and those are located on the higher floors (we were on floor 20) so you have a nice view and the room is bright and not tooo loud.

Many of my friends and customers see my post, and ask where is this Hotel; I really recommend them to stay at this hotel 😀 Hotel need to improve more on: employees need to understand some simple English language, the president suite we stay, the second morning we find out the ceiling is some leaking, we tell the front desk, they said ok will check, afternoon we came back to hotel and See still leaking and see the trash can already half full of water, and I call again to reception, two people come up to check, after that, they told me they can’t do anything, and they not even tell me , will switch us to a different room, and next morning is more leaking, I was Afraid the ceiling to fall down, until the last night we stay, they switch us to a smaller president suite, when we at the new room, and I requested a blanket, waiting for 30 minutes, no house keeping bringing anything, and I started to feel mad and call reception again, and ask why 30 minutes still no blankets deliver, this need to improve.5 stars hotel, need 5 stars service, also need to improve on the ceiling noise, inside the room at night, we can hear the restaurant upstairs moving the chair or table, this need to improve.
Hotel offered some nice restaurants and a bar on the rooftop The light switch to the bathroom was by the front door, so using the bathroom at night was about navigating in the dark!

This is a very busy plush hotel , we was on the 12A floor room was modern high tec but in my opinion not practical at all , the bed had one foot gap from the main bathroom glass pane , no side cabinet or light switch if you needed to get up during the night.

I booked a room at Hanoi Silk hotel center but when we arrive at around 10-11 pm at night, the hotel staff informs us that they have no rooms and that the room advertised is under maintenance, hence they make us wait and move us to a different hotel at a much smaller and underrated and under standard room that toilet could not flush, air condition is in poor condition, the plumber and builder keep coming to the room many times in the morning 8 am just to fix the toilet while I and my children were sleeping.
Didnt Have the breakfast but the location is the best Tripple room a little bigger as the extra bed was in front of the robe and safe

Added to this security is very lax, for instance one of our party accidentally went to a separate floor and his key card opened a different room - and the safe is not connected to the wall (it's a small loose box in the wardrobe).
Very helpful staff and the location was great!
The staff is very friendly and the location is very central.
It was a great location and the staff were amazing.

The other issue was, (and this was partially out fault for not doing our research properly), we booked a couple's massage which was very average in a room that looks nothing like the pictures, but we did not know we we supposed to tip as we were not aware of this tipping culture (this was our first time in Vietnam, a little warning from the hotel staff would have been appreciated), also, we were interrogated by the masseuse at the end of the session with a piece of paper to leave handwritten feedback, to which we wrote average and explained the reasons why (then they started to interrogate us as if we had done something really wrong) it felt very uncomfortable.
The size of the room was great and the free wifi was quite good and fast as well.
We found that the bed was a little on the firm side and the hot water was slow to warm up (perhaps this was because we were on the top floor).

We enjoyed our stay at the hotel, where the rooms were clean and the Staff was helpfull, especially Thomas and Anna who helped us with booking of tours and recommandations in Hanoi and nearby areas.
Friendly staff that was very helpful , Daniel helped us with in the reception with check in and checkout.

The breakfast was basic, not too clean tables and the staff was very slow.

Location is good it’s close to lost attractions Firstly the room that we chose was quite small but the sealing is also very low, and breakfast was poor no option for halaal people only some fruits or cereal.
The receptionist Joseph was amazing took us to buy a sim for the phone and penned money and did everything to make us feel comfortable Breakfast is very basic
Staff were very helpful and our stay at the hotel was amazing.
we had a great stay and the breakfast was amazing
We loved our stay at La Passion, we had a beautiful room with a comfy bed and amazing shower pressure, the hotel is in a great location, and all the the staff were so friendly and helpful!
The hotel room was very clean and comfortable, with a nice atmosphere.

I highly recommend the hotel, it is in a very central location, very pleasant and warm, the staff is very kind and gives you the feeling that you are very important to them The breakfast was very varied and delicious, both Western food and Vietnamese food
Room was big, clean and very nicely decorated, and very cozy, as all the hotel was.
Good value for the money.
Good value for money.
Very good value for money!
The room was comfortable and clean!
Room was very clean and comfortable .
The location was really good, staff were helpful and friendly, and the room was clean and comfortable.
The rooms are brand new and very nice, the staff are super friendly and helpful.
We had booked one standard room and one Junior suite and there was NO difference in the rooms EXCEPT a narrow balcony where we could not even sit.
we spent one night in a standard double room and the next night we were upgraded to a lovely huge room.
we got transferred to the premium hotel, but the rooms are smaller, the staff is not so well communicative as at first hotel.
I then read the reviews again and found out that a lot of the guests had been upgraded to the La Passion Premium, which is a different hotel and by the looks/sounds of things, much newer and nicer.

You can pick from 4 set menus and dine for breakfast with a waiter serving the breakfast - please note this is only in the premium as we stayed one night on the La Passion on and they offer buffet style.
We have a wonderful stay in the hotel and everyone is so friendly and we would want to come back again and stay in this hotel again.
We will stay here again when we come back!
We will come back to Hanoi just to stay here again.
I would recommend this hotel.
Would highly recommend this hotel.
Would recommend this hotel!
This was the second hotel I stayed in during my time in Hanoi and its location near the lake is ideal, and I preferred the space around here rather than other parts of the old town.
I actually don't have problem with that but this should have been stated on booking.com because if I knew I would pay everything in cash to avoid the transaction fees.
I was in 803, and would suggest anyone being put into that room to avoid.
